tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.carbon_cycling_tests.test_decomposition module

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.carbon_cycling_tests.test_decomposition.test_calc_temp_factor(layer_temp, x_inflection: float = 15.4, y_inflection: float = 11.75, point_distance: float = 29.7, inflection_slope=0.03, normalizer=20.80546)

ensures that temperature effect was calculated according to the formula in “pseudocode_soil” S.6.A.1

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.carbon_cycling_tests.test_decomposition.test_calc_moisture_factor(water_factor, a_term: float = 0.55, b_term: float = 1.7, c_term: float = -0.007, first_exponent=6.648115, second_exponent=3.22) → None

ensures that moisture effect was calculated according to the formula in “pseudocode_soil” S.6.A.2

tests.soil_crop_tests.soil_tests.carbon_cycling_tests.test_decomposition.test_decompose(temp_average, layers)

ensures that all SoilData attributes were correctly updated
